comments.text:
Brother thanks for  the video. Itha naan puruchukittayn educational purpose kaga only nu. Neenga ungakitta irukkura stocks aa vachchu explain panni irukkinga. But Enakku ithula silathu surprise aa irukku. Neenga experienced. So itha paththi next vara video session la sollunga please.

First Indusind Bank la already problem irukku and neraya volatile aana bank. Recent aa reasonable price ku poittu thirumba down la poguthu. Itha eppadi neenga main list la vachchu irukkinga.

Next muthoot microfin and Spandana Sphoorthy rendum micro finance business la irukku. Already micro finance business koncham problem la irukku. But ungaloda main list rendu micro finance stock  irukku. Same time Bajaj Finance or Bajaj Finserv maathiri neenga strong aana company aa yean main list or watch list la add pannula. 
Also gold loan business stocks ethum list illa. Why Brother?

Ellorum next power sector and Data center business future la nalla varum nu solluraanga. But ithu related aa ethum neenga consider pannama irukkurathu surprise aa irukku . Also capital goods  company yum illa.

Brother naan recent aa thaan unga channel aa follow pannurayn. Ithu ennoda 2nd comment . Ungaluku market la nalla experience irukkunu puriyuthu. 

Ungaloda perception vera maathiri irukku. So ellorum pannuramathiri neengalum pannanum nu entha rule in illa. 

Enakku market experience illa. 2 years aa thaan koncham konchama add pannurayn.

Oil & Gas  Business related aa vum ethum unga main and watch list la illa .

So please as a experienced person in market etha time irikkum pothu koncham sollunga. Only Educational purpose. Enakkum neraya questions mind la irukku. Ungaloda explanation valiya Enakku oru purithal kedaikalaam.
comments.author: @VelmuruganStories
